caption: A young boy wearing a red and white striped short-sleeved shirt, brown shorts, and green shoes crawls across a dirt surface in front of a reddish-brown wall. Behind him is a doorway partially covered by a yellow curtain with white circular patterns. In the first frame, the boy is positioned on the left, leaning forward with one hand on the ground and his right leg extended. As the sequence progresses, he moves further to the right, shifting his weight and pulling himself forward. In the final frame, he has moved slightly further right, and another person, wearing a light blue shirt, becomes visible standing inside the doorway behind the curtain. White text appears on the screen in the subsequent frames, stating, "I am separated from everything."
